prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L 16V ABF engine code (from VW Golf GTI G60) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.5mm bore, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ARP head studs. Paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Milltek Sport 200-cell catalytic converter and 3.5-inch titanium-tipped muffler.

Custom ECU remapping via AEM Infinity 7 standalone engine management system, calibrated for 300+ HP on 98 RON fuel with a 22 psi boost target. Includes a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom water-methanol injection kit (AEM V2) with a 50/50 methanol-water mix for charge cooling.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear lowering) and polybushings from Powerflex (black series, 95A durometer). Front sway bar upgraded to a H&R 25mm adjustable unit, paired with OMP Motorsport spherical bearing end links. Rear subframe reinforced with a custom 4-point strut brace from RacingLine and a Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny VW Santana GT widebody kit (Pandem Design), including carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders with integrated vents. Front bumper modified to fit a custom Hella Rallye 700 driving light setup with a carbon fiber mesh grille.

OEM+ interior with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara and Nappa leather (custom stitching in VW Motorsport blue). Rear seats removed and replaced with a custom aluminum half-cage (T45 steel, 3-point harness bar) from Custom Cages UK, painted in RAL 5010 Gentian Blue.

Exterior paint in a custom matte Lamborghini Verde Mantis (PPG DBC basecoat) with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and B-pillars. Wheels: BBS RS-GT1 (8.5x17 ET35 front, 9.5x17 ET25 rear) in gold with Toyo R888R tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear).
